caption: A man with yellow skin, a prominent nose, and light blue hair, wearing a dark blue suit with a black tie and white shirt, stands in front of a red curtain and blue patterned backdrop. He is surrounded by several other yellow-skinned people, including a woman with long red hair wearing a pink dress. The man begins by gesturing with his right hand held in a loose fist near his chest. He then abruptly raises his right arm high into the air with his hand clenched in a fist. As he holds his arm aloft, he brings his left hand up to his face, touching his nose. Finally, he maintains his raised right arm while continuing to touch his face. The background characters, including the red-haired woman and other onlookers, maintain expressions of surprise or agitation throughout the sequence.
